description: Black and red blunt toed shoes with central lace-up fastening with branding at the heelFabric waterproof upper with a rubber overlay on the toe box and eyelets on the side for ventilation, reinforced overlay at the heel collarPadded and cushioned inner and a soft footbedUpper stitched to the outsoleRubber outsole with herringbone grooves and pivot point in the big toe region
